name: yaoyao-memory-plugin
description: Yaoyao Memory — 4-layer AI memory system with FTS5 + sqlite-vec hybrid search, sentiment analysis, timeline, cloud backup, and topic trends. Minimal external deps (sqlite-vec).
author: Yaoyao

scripts.test:core: node --test src/__tests__/remind-cron.test.ts src/__tests__/trends-core.test.ts src/__tests__/quality-core.test.ts src/__tests__/recommend-core.test.ts src/__tests__/retain-core.test.ts

dynamic_code_execution.reason: Cloud backup adapters use child_process for SFTP/Samba file transfer only. All commands are hardcoded, no arbitrary code execution. Passwords passed via environment variables.
dynamic_code_execution.mitigation: Cloud tools require explicit credential configuration in ~/.openclaw/credentials/secrets.env

llm_suspicious.reason: Optional LLM API calls for memory extraction pipeline (L1→L2→L3). Only active when user configures llm.apiKey. No telemetry or data transmission without explicit configuration.
llm_suspicious.mitigation: Set llm.enabled=false to disable all LLM functionality

vt_suspicious.reason: VirusTotal heuristic triggered by child_process imports. All code is open source and auditable at https://github.com/taobaoaz/yaoyao-plugin. Minimal external deps: sqlite-vec (optional vector search).
vt_suspicious.mitigation: Full source available for manual review

openclawSecurity.dataStorage: 100% local (SQLite FTS5 + filesystem). No telemetry. No analytics.
openclawSecurity.dependencies: Minimal: sqlite-vec for optional vector search; typescript (dev). Zero runtime npm deps beyond sqlite-vec.
